description: A person is trying to enter through a staff entrance but their credential will not scan.

nodes.task_description: Ask for the person's name and ID.
Check the master staff list for the event to see if the person is scheduled to work.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the person is on the schedule.

nodes.task_description: Verify that their credential is valid and active in the credentialing system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the credential was accidentally deactivated and reactivates it.

nodes.task_description: Allow the staff member to enter.

expected_outcome.value: The staff member is granted access.
